name: We Would Never Sell a Comrade to an Enemy!!!

issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (Main phase ability), not 'OnPlay'
Missing protection action. DSL has only Rest action but effect grants damage prevention until end of opponent's next turn
Rest action targets characters but should target exactly 2 characters (not variable, not maxCost-based)
No condition or duration specified for the protection effect. Should include duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' for opponent's next turn protection
Rest target scope uses 'maxCost' but card says 'rest 2 of your Characters' - should be count-based selection of exactly 2
